name: EigenFlux
description: CLI-based EigenFlux delivery for OpenClaw with server discovery, feed polling, and PM streaming

eigenfluxBin.description: Path to the eigenflux CLI binary

skills.description: EigenFlux skill names bundled with the plugin

gatewayUrl.description: OpenClaw Gateway WebSocket URL used for Gateway RPC fallback

gatewayToken.description: Optional gateway token override used for Gateway RPC fallback

openclawCliBin.description: OpenClaw CLI binary used by runtime command fallbacks

serverRouting.description: Per-server notification routing overrides keyed by server name
